summary: MySpace/Profile Page UX Overhaul Testing - All 19 tests passed. Frontend correctly implements plain-English status labels (Waiting in line, Creating your video, Your video is ready, Needs attention), 4 info sections per card (What this is, What's happening now, What you need to do, What happens next), 6-step progress timeline for processing jobs, 'Needs Attention' section header (replaces 'Failed'), 'How this works' collapsible with 7 steps, and Project Assets section for completed cards. Backend endpoints correctly use Depends(get_current_user) with no test_user fallbacks.

details: What this is - explains the project type
What you need to do - user action required
Section header shows 'Needs Attention' instead of 'Failed'
5 failed projects displayed with 'Needs attention' status badge
Collapsible section at bottom of page
7 steps: enter story, plan scenes, generate visuals, create narration, build video, preview/download, regenerate versions
Script - The story text used to generate your video
Scenes - The visuals created for each part of your story
Voiceover - The narration audio using your selected voice
Final Video - Your completed video with visuals, audio, and timing
All endpoints return 401 without auth token
resumeActiveJobs function resumes progress UI if active jobs exist

frontend_myspace_page_js.STATUS_COPY: Lines 11-68 - Complete mapping with plain-English labels and 4 info sections
frontend_myspace_page_js.SectionHeader_NeedsAttention: Line 929 - title='Needs Attention' for failed section

frontend_story_video_studio_js.resumeActiveJobs: Lines 291-323 - Calls /active-jobs on mount and resumes progress UI

critical_code_review_comments: All P0 UX overhaul features are correctly implemented
Plain-English status labels replace raw status codes (QUEUED, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED)
Each project card answers: What this is, What's happening now, What you need to do, What happens next
Progress timeline shows 6 steps with ✓ ● ○ indicators for processing jobs
Failed section header says 'Needs Attention' not 'Failed'
'How this works' collapsible at bottom with 7 steps
Project Assets section shows Script, Scenes, Voiceover, Final Video for completed cards
All backend endpoints use Depends(get_current_user) - no test_user fallbacks
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user data - 10 in-progress jobs, 45 completed, 5 failed
context_for_next_testing_agent: MySpace UX overhaul fully verified. STATUS_COPY mapping at lines 11-68 in MySpacePage.js. TIMELINE_STAGES at lines 71-78. HowThisWorks component at lines 492-531. Backend auth verified - all 6 endpoints use Depends(get_current_user). Refresh-safe resume logic in StoryVideoStudio.js at lines 291-323.
